builds.build_description_eng: Focuses on Charged Shot and trying to deal as much spirit damage as possible. Great against low HP enemies with low spirit resist. Bad against Tanks and close range enemies.
builds.name: Charged Shot

builds.build_description_eng: Focuses on talon's Bow. Good in team fights where they arent focused on. Bad against CC.
builds.name: Gun

builds.build_description_eng: Focuses on damage from both Charged Shot and the Bow. Has the benefit of both builds, but also the weaknesses. Strong damage, but weak to CC.
builds.name: Hybrid

builds.build_description_eng: VERY off meta build. Focuses on talon's snare. Goal is to more of a supportive character for teamfights where you can continuously silence enemies. Good vs Mid range cluster focused enemies. Awful against aerial/long range characters.
builds.name: Snare

builds.build_description_eng: Nieche Build. Focuses on talon's ult, getting as many bird stacks . Weak against high spirit damage resist and evasive/fast enemies.
builds.name: Bird
